title: AIR References Index
description: Index of reference documents shared across skills and agents. References are broken out from skills to keep documentation DRY — a single reference can be used by multiple skills.

propertyNames.description: Reference identifier key. Must be alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

Reference.description: A shared reference document that can be attached to multiple skills.

id.description: Unique identifier for this reference. Must match the key in the parent object.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the reference.

description.description: Concise description of what knowledge this reference contains.

file.description: Relative path to the reference document file (typically Markdown).
